hero_subtitle: He builds responsive interfaces where technology meets precision
motivation_phrase: With great power comes great electricity bill
about_paragraph_1: I'm a self-taught front-end developer from Colombia who enjoys building modern and responsive websites from scratch. I like transforming ideas into clean and functional digital experiences using modern web technologies.
about_paragraph_2: I'm currently improving my skills in JavaScript and modern web development while exploring areas like Linux and cybersecurity. My long-term goal is to become a Software Engineer and contribute to building useful and impactful software.
contact-text: I’m interested in freelance opportunities. However, if you have other request or question, don’t  hesitate to contact me
